utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if they are fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details: The format requires each coverage item to include costs and the type of coverage. The plan includes names and costs for health, property, travel, and additional services (even if 'None' with €0). However, the requirement states 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—the plan lists only a plan name and cost, not explicit confirmation of both physical and mental health coverage. Similarly, 'home/contents insurance with costs' is required—only a plan name and cost are provided, without explicit home/contents specification. 'travel insurance with costs' is included by name and cost; this meets the minimal 'travel insurance with costs' wording. 'additional_services: any enhancement services with costs' is included (None, €0). 'total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' is included with total monthly, total annual, and monthly savings. Given the instruction 'fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details', health lacks explicit physical and mental details, and property lacks explicit home/contents details; thus those two are not fully specified. Travel, additional_services, and total_budget meet the specified details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named items: HealthFirst Specialized Care Package (health), InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). We must match each to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. HealthFirst Specialized Care Package is not listed in the ground-truth; the closest HealthFirst entries are 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (health) but the name does not match exactly, so it cannot be mapped. InsurePlus Standard Coverage appears under property_protection.home_content with rating 7. PrimeTravel Premium Plan appears under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10. Additional services are 'None' and do not map to any rated item.
